sentences.arabic: الكَرَمُ هُوَ جُزْءٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo je osnovni dio arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is a fundamental part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَزُورُ الضَّيْفُ بَيْتًا عَرَبِيًّا، يَسْتَقْبِلُهُ صَاحِبُ المَنْزِلِ بِتَرْحِيبٍ حَارٍّ.
sentences.translation: Kada gost posjeti arapski dom, domaćin ga dočekuje s toplom dobrodošlicom.
sentences.translationEn: When a guest visits an Arab home, the host welcomes them warmly.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ المُضِيفُ القَهْوَةَ العَرَبِيَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِلزُّوَّارِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Domaćin posjetiteljima uvijek poslužuje arapsku kafu i hurme.
sentences.translationEn: The host always serves Arabic coffee and dates to the visitors.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ إِكْرَامُ الضَّيْفِ وَاجِبًا وَتَقْلِيدًا قَدِيمًا.
sentences.translation: Počašćivanje gosta smatra se obavezom i starom tradicijom.
sentences.translationEn: Honoring the guest is considered a duty and an ancient tradition.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الضَّيْفُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ فِي هَذِهِ الأَجْوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Gost se osjeća ugodno i sretno u ovoj atmosferi.
sentences.translationEn: The guest feels comfortable and happy in this atmosphere.
